variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11609 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11609 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11609 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1659 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11609
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1659 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11609
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1659 air filter offers more filtering surface than standard air filters, is located above the engine to draw cool, clean air, needs less maintenance time and cost, and has easy filter removal.
